causal_question: By how many percentage points did Section 5 preclearance coverage change Black voter registration (share of the Black voting-age population) in covered North Carolina counties from 1960 to 1970 compared with uncovered counties?
vague_question: Did the preclearance part of the Voting Rights Act lead to higher Black voter registration in some North Carolina counties a few years after the law (into the early 1970s)?
